violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Observed toppings for the ice cream not protected at time of inspection.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed several items in refrigerators that were not date marked.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Observed dried food inside microwave.--Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Observed upright freezer in food prep area needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed wall behind griddle and floor by fryer need to be cleaned.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
